events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: unshielded rubber coupling staged for underground use vs shielded coupling. This is non-compliant. Need to fail.

  "findings": [
    "Unshielded rubber Fernco-style coupling staged for underground transition is non-compliant; underground installations require shielded/shear-resistant couplings per manufacturer listings and IPC."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace staged unshielded rubber coupling with a shielded mechanical coupling listed for underground/buried use before making the transition.",
    "Verify coupling listing and material compatibility with both pipe types; follow manufacturer installation torque/assembly instructions."
  ],
  "rationale": "Unshielded rubber couplings can deform, shear, and leak under soil load and settlement when buried. Shielded couplings with stainless steel bands/clamps are required for underground transitions to maintain alignment and seal integrity.",
  "references": [
    "IPC - approved materials and installation per manufacturer listings",
    "Manufacturer listings for shielded mechanical couplings (underground/buried service)"
  ]
